ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-29-2012 Continued To Mar-14-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Entitlement
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Owens for Petitioner. David Baer for Michael Colantuono (Respondent). Nancy Rasch for Barbara St. Marie (Executor).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the Decedent's intent, who should receive distribution of the Estate and whether the antilapse statute applies. The Court presented its analysis. Further argument was presented. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
